title: verify-hardware-measurements input
description: Input piped on stdin to `tinfoil-conformance verify-hardware-measurements`. Covers SPEC §6 TDX hardware-measurement matching.

enclave_measurement.description: Enclave TDX measurement. SPEC §6.3 requires type=TdxGuestV2 with exactly 5 registers (MRTD, RTMR0, RTMR1, RTMR2, RTMR3).

hardware_measurements.description: Candidate hardware measurements. SPEC §6.3 iterates and returns the first match where hw.mrtd == enclave.registers[0] AND hw.rtmr0 == enclave.registers[1].
